title: hieracium hispidulum subsp. fusiense
intro: Hieracium hispidulum subsp. fusiense is a subspecies of the Hieracium genus, commonly known as Hawkweed, a type of flowering plant in the dandelion family. This plant has been traditionally used for its medicinal properties, which include its anti-inflammatory and antioxidant effects. The health benefits of Hieracium hispidulum subsp. fusiense include its ability to reduce inflammation and improve digestion, as well as its potential to act as an antibacterial agent. Herbal preparations of the plant are typically made from its leaves and flowers, and can be found in the form of teas, tinctures, and infusions.
